title: Coffee grinder with ejection device
abstract: A coffee grinder (100) comprises: a hopper (1) comprising a compartment (15) that can be accessed from an upper opening (12), a lower opening (13), a body (20) connected to the hopper (1) in lower position, a grinding unit (3) disposed in the body (20) and comprising two blades (30) that are spaced out in such a way to create an air space (34), a conveying duct (4) for delivering the ground coffee, an ejection device (6) disposed upstream the air space (34) between the blades (30); the ejection device (6) is suitable for generating compressed air in the air space (34) between the blades (30) towards the conveying duct (4) in such a way as to eject the residues of ground coffee.
claims:
Claims 1 ) Coffee grinder (100) comprising: - a hopper (1 ) suitable for containing coffee beans; said hopper (1 ) comprising a compartment (15) that can be accessed from an upper opening (12) in order to introduce the coffee beans in the hopper (1 ) and a lower opening (13) to eject the coffee beans from the hopper (1 ); - a body (20) connected to the hopper (1 ) in lower position; - a grinding unit (3) disposed in the body (20); said grinding unit (3) comprising two blades (30) that are spaced out in such a way to create an air space for grinding the coffee beans; said air space being in communication with the hopper (1 ); - actuation means (31 ) connected to at least one of said blades (30) to rotate said at least one blade (30); - a conveying duct (4) disposed in the body (20) and in communication with the air space (34) between the blades (30); said conveying duct (4) comprising an outlet (40) for delivering the ground coffee; characterized in that said coffee grinder (100) comprises an ejection device (6) disposed upstream the air space (34) between the blades (30); said ejection device (6) is suitable for generating compressed air in the air space (34) between the blades (30) towards the conveying duct (4) in such a way as to eject the residues of ground coffee. 2) The coffee grinder (100) of claim 1 , wherein said ejection device (6) comprises return means (R) connected to said hopper. 3) The coffee grinder (100) of claim 2, wherein said return means (R) comprise a membrane (60) connected to said hopper (1 ). 4) The coffee grinder (100) of claim 3, wherein the membrane (60) is of bellows-type. 5) The coffee grinder (100) of claim 3 or 4, wherein the membrane (60) comprises a wall (67) of compressible material and a compartment (61 ) defined by said wall (67); said compartment (61 ) of the membrane being accessible by 

 means of an upper opening (62) defined by an upper edge (64) of the membrane and by means of a lower opening (63) defined by a lower edge (65) of the membrane. 6) The coffee grinder (100) of claim 5, wherein the lower edge (65) of the membrane (60) comprises a perimeter groove suitable for receiving an upper edge of the hopper (1 ). 7) The coffee grinder (100) of any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein the membrane (60) comprises a lower rigid frame to favor the coupling of the membrane (60) with the hopper (1 ). 8) The coffee grinder of claim 1 , wherein said ejection device (6) provides for mounting in the hopper (1 ) with possibility of sliding axially with respect to the body (20), in such a way that said hopper acts as piston to push compressed air towards the air space between the blades. 9) The coffee grinder of claim 8, wherein said ejection device comprises return means (R) to restore the hopper to the initial position after being pressed. 10) The coffee grinder (100) of claim 9, wherein said return means (R) comprise a membrane (60) connected to said hopper (1 ) and to said body (20). 1 1 ) The coffee grinder (100) of any one of claims 8 to 10, wherein said hopper (1 ) comprises conveying means that stop the delivery of coffee beans from the hopper (1 ). 12) The coffee grinder of claim 1 , wherein said ejection device (6) comprises a conduit connected to a pneumatic system and to the compartment (15) of the hopper, in such a way as to send compressed air to the compartment of the hopper. 13) The coffee grinder (100) of any one of the preceding claims, also comprising a lid (5) suitable for closing said hopper (1 ). 14) The coffee grinder of claim 13, wherein said lid (5) is mounted with possibility of axially sliding and is airtight with respect to said hopper (1 ). 15) The coffee grinder of claim 14 when depending on claim 5, wherein said lid (5) is disposed on said upper opening (62) of the membrane (60) to close the upper opening (62) of the membrane (60). 

 16) The coffee grinder (100) of claim 14, when depending on claim 5, wherein the lid (5) and the membrane (60) are made in one piece.
